blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,169 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
